## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / adapter
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)

- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt -- --check` passes (no formatting changes)
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes (zero warnings)
- [ ] `cargo test --features "duckdb sqlite"` passes
- [ ] New code has unit tests; coverage ≥ 80 % (`make coverage`)
- [ ] Public API has doc comments (`///`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-facing change)
